title: Custom eggless cakes for Marsden Park, Schofields, and Rouse Hill families
summary:
Marsden Park is growing fast. The bakeries haven't kept up.

If you're looking for a custom eggless cake for a birthday, baby shower, or Diwali in Schofields, Box Hill, or Rouse Hill — this is where you order.

Num Nums opened at Riverstone Shopping Centre in December 2024. Every cake we make is 100% eggless. Not some of them. Every one.

Six sizes. 15 flavours including Rasmalai, Mango, and Ferrero Rocher. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Any design — photo references welcome.

48-hour notice minimum. Pickup from Riverstone. Free parking.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: custom cake Rouse Hill North West Sydney
